name: 100% Golf
author: Poki
description: 100% Golf is a sports game that puts a new spin on the classic golf experience by replacing scores with percentages. You start every level with 100% power, and each move decreases this number corresponding to the power of your shots. Your aim is to pass every level with as much leftover power as possible, because hitting 0% results in losing the round. There are a total of 27 holes to practice on, and an Endless Mode to maximize the fun once you've finished the main campaign. 100% Golf is the golf game you've been waiting for, one hundred par-cent guaranteed! How to play: Hold down the left mouse button (or your finger) and aim for the hole before letting go. About the creator: 100% Golf is created by Alexander Johansson, a game developer based in the United Kingdom. He is the creator behind the unique platformer narcissus. You should give it a play on Poki !

author: Poki
description: 2048 is a single-player mathematical puzzle game where you merge tiles with equal numbers. The goal of the game is to merge the tiles until you have 2048. With each merger of tiles the value doubles. You can slide tiles in any direction to make the identical tiles merge. The grid on which you play is 4x4 so you don't have a lot of space to maneuvre. Try keep some free spaces. How to play 2048? Use your arrow keys to slide the tiles in the direction you want. When tiles with equal numbers collide, they will merge into one tile and double in value. What is the best strategy to play 2048? The best strategy is to keep your highest value tile in one of the corners, and work the other tiles in that direction. Who created 2048? Poki features the original 2048 game created by Gabriele Cirulli. He created the game in 2014 and was initially inspired by Veewo Studios' 1024, which was inspired by the game Threes.

Can you hit the ultimate number before it all overflows? How to play 2048 Balls? Move the ball with your mouse, and left click to drop the ball! Who created 2048 Balls? 2048 Balls was created by Unico Studio. Zoom in for easier coloring of small areas. While Zooming in, the brush tool size is smaller for more precise coloring. Undo button removes your previous coloring action. Redo button restores your previous coloring action. When happy with your coloring, use -> and finalize using Filters and Outlines. Download your image and share to friends. Who created Anycolor? Anycolor was created by Aniway, a game development team based in Finland. The Number icons on the side. Click these to choose which number to color in next! To play, follow these steps! Activate the Number icon 1 by tapping it. Areas in the image marked with the number 1 correspond to the Number icon 1. These areas, marked with the number 1, are now highlighted (grey and white checkered pattern). Now tap one of these highlighted areas, and it will be filled with color. Keep on coloring the highlighted areas. When the last highlighted area has been colored, the Number icon 1 disappears. This tells you all the areas of that number have been colored. Choose the next Number icon, which is 2 Keep on coloring until all Number icons have disappeared The image is now complete! name: Basketball Stars
author: Poki
description: Basketball Stars Basketball Stars is a fast head-to-head basketball game where you outscore your opponent before the timer ends. Basketball Stars is about watching your opponent so you can steal the ball at the right moment and get past the defender to score before time runs out. There are no teams to manage and no upgrades to grind. You control every move: steal, block and shoot to score. Play Basketball Stars for free at Poki and step onto the court for fast one-on-one matchups! How Basketball Stars works Each match starts as a one-on-one contest with a simple goal: score more before time runs out. You only get 60 seconds. That's just enough time for a few drives and a steal, or to make one mistake that lets your opponent score before you can recover. The short rounds make it easy to jump straight back in and try again . Miss a play, restart within seconds and try again with a better move. This is where you start blocking shots you used to miss and turning defence into fast points. Now it starts to feel less chaotic . You start spotting chances to steal or drive to the basket faster. Sometimes the whole match comes down to one play. Possession changes instantly , so you must switch from scoring to defending without hesitation. Hesitate for a second and the ball is gone. Act first and you control the play. Controls Desktop: Move: Left and right arrows Jump / shoot: Up arrow Pump / block: Down arrow Dash: Double-tap a direction Steal: X Supershot: Z Mobile: Use touch controls for movement and actions Shooting and scoring Scoring is about getting into the right spot and choosing the right moment to shoot. Getting closer to the basket makes your shots much harder to block. Rushed shots are easier for your opponent to block or steal. The Supershot special move can quickly turn a losing round into a win. Because rounds are so short, one good drive can decide everything . Good timing is often the difference between a win and running out of time. Basketball Stars game mod

name: Blocky Blast Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Blocky Blast Puzzle is a browser-based block blast puzzle game where you place solid block shapes onto a grid and clear space by filling rows and columns. The goal is to keep the board clear for as long as possible by placing blocks carefully instead of rushing. Play Blocky Blast Puzzle for free on Poki and see how long you can keep the board clear before space runs out! Block Blast mechanic A Block Blast happens when you completely fill a horizontal row or a vertical column . This is the main way you clear space in Blocky Blast Puzzle . When a row or column is completed, the blocks disappear instantly, creating room for future placements. The game clearly highlights when a move will trigger a Block Blast, so you can spot clears before placing the block . Bigger clears happen when multiple rows or columns are completed at once. These moments open the board dramatically and give you breathing room for the next set of blocks. Blocky Blast gameplay Gameplay moves in a simple loop where you place blocks, clear space, and place new ones again. Each round, you are given 3 blocks . To keep playing, all 3 must be placed somewhere on the board. Where you place a block now can make the next few moves easier or harder. Clean placements leave more empty space for the next blocks. Rushed moves often feel fine at first, then suddenly leave no place for the next set of blocks. Controls Blocky Blast Puzzle uses simple drag-and-drop controls. Desktop: Drag blocks onto the board using the mouse. Mobile: Tap and drag blocks into position with your finger. Controls stay responsive and consistent across devices, making quick adjustments easy when space gets tight. Scoring You earn points by clearing rows and columns. Each clear gives you 10 points , and your score goes up as you clear more rows and columns. The biggest score jumps happen when Block Blasts happen one after another. One clear leads to another, the board stays open, and your score starts climbing faster before you notice.

name: CircloO
author: Poki
description: CircloO is a puzzle game, where you control a ball within a large circle. You have to roll the ball around the circle to complete the level. In circloO, you must use momentum to fight the forces of gravity. Roll back and forth, and try to hop over the round obstacles in your path. Each level consists of multiple parts, and every new part will grow the level in size! The games saves the amount of time you take to complete a level. So on replaying a level, your best time (and best time per part) will be featured in the top left corner. This way you can try and beat your own times and set new record for each level. The game features 20 levels, of which 6 are labelled as difficult. The game also features a nice soundtrack that helps you stay calm and collected during difficult levels. Can you beat all the levels and become a CircloO master? How to play: Move - W/A/S/D or arrow keys About the creator: CircloO was created by Dutch developer Florian van Strien.

Controls: Move - W/A/S/D or arrow keys About the creator: Florian van Strien created the CircloO series. description: Dragon Simulator 3D is a simulation game where you can be a dragon. The goal of the game is to complete the missions of dragons across the level and to collect stars. Once you have enough stars your dragon will upgrade to the next level and become stronger and faster. The missions in this game are really fun to play and they really improve your dragon skills. Fly over the mountains and soar down the peaks to get the feeling of actually flying. How to play: Dragons are not easy to control: Move around - WASD Spit fire - LMB Attack with your tail - RMB Take-off/Land - Q Fly up - Spacebar Fly down - C Speed up - Shift Lock cursor - L Hide interface - H About the creator: Dragon Simulator 3D was created by CyberGoldFinch. It is the next game in his animal simulation series which consists of a lot of games such as Tiger Simulator 3D , Horse Simulator 3D , Dog Simulator 3D and many more. He also created a nice archery game called Archer Master 3D: Castle Defense .

author: Poki

If you're quick enough you can dominate the lobbies by outsmarting and outdrawing your oponents. Are you ready for some drawing and dashing? Then grab your pen and let's go! How do I play Draw my Path Obby? Move: A & D, or Left & Right Arrow Jump: W, Up Arrow, or Spacebar Pause: Escape Pen: Q Eraser: E Remove All Drawings: R Use your mouse to draw your path! Who created Draw my Path Obby? Draw my Path Obby is created by Emolingo Games. Play their other games on Poki: Car Machines , Disaster Arena , Escape From School , Rainbow Obby , and Sword Masters ! How can I play Draw my Path Obby for free? You can play Draw my Path Obby for free on Poki. Can I play Draw my Path Obby on mobile devices and desktop? Draw my Path Obby can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Draw my Path Obby with my friend? Yes! Draw my Path Obby is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!

Once you've finished, click "ok" to see if you've recreated the picture exactly as shown. Who is good at drawing pixel art? How to play Draw Pixel Art? Click to select a color and click to draw. Be quick enough to out drill the lava, and make sure to aim at the spinning wheels, if you miss, you won't make it.  Unlock all the characters and drill your way up, set a new record, and become the number 1 Drill Up master! name: Dual Cat
author: Poki
description: Dual Cat is a puzzle platform game in which you're a cat who's looking for his feline companion in a mysterious lab full of obstacles. After being kidnapped by a bunch of mysterious robots, you must utilize your new powers to stay alive and escape the dangerous facility that's full of robots and machines trying to lock you up. In order to complete a level, you must collect the stars and then pick the fish up. You have the power to play dead very efficiently. Use this power to be temporarily invincible whenever you're in a perilous situation - the attacking enemies will just pass through you as if you're a ghost. But there's a catch: You can't move when you're playing dead. So make sure you deactivate this power as soon as the danger has passed, and move on quickly. Also make sure to explore every nook and cranny, and collect all three stars in every level to unlock the special case. Can you finish every level in Dual Cat? How to play Dual Cat? Explore an enormous map with shops, training dojos, and a lively atmosphere. Meet other ducks whom you can befriend, race or battle. There are 80 training games and 8 skills to improve to be the greatest duck adventurer. And the greatest duck adventurer ever lived should have plenty of swag, right? There are over 75 weapons, costumes, and accessories to make your duck look unique. Come on and be a part of this exciting adventure! How to play: Move - WASD, Arrow keys or LMB Interact - Space bar or LMB About the creator: Duck Life Adventure is created by Wix Games. author: Poki
description: Remove matching tiles to score in Duck Pond Mahjong! This board game features an infinite amount of tile combinations in 24 main formations. Your goal is to find pairs of numbers, symbols, and pictures on free tiles. Look for ducks, flowers, acorns, and eggs!

name: Duck Life 2
author: Poki
description: Duck Life 2 is an adventure game where you train your duck to race in various disciplines such as running, flying, swimming and climbing to be the best duck adventurer in the world. Earn coins by training or racing fellow ducks. There are five locations for races: Scotland, England, Egypt, Hawaii and Japan. Just make sure your duck has some stamina before the next race by feeding it seeds. And don't forget to spend your hard-earned duck dollars on cool accessories! How to play: Running - Use the up arrow key to jump. Flying - Use the left and right arrows to guide the duck. Swimming - Use the up arrow to jump, the down arrow to dive and the right and left arrow to move around. Climbing - Use the left and right arrow keys to jump between the walls of the canyon. Who created Duck Life 2? Duck Life 2 is created by Wix Games, based in the United Kingdom. They are also the creators of Duck Life , Duck Life Adventure (Demo) , Duck Life 3 , ducklife-4 and Duck Life: Battle . Play them for free on Poki !

name: Duck Life 3
author: Poki
description: Breed genetically modified ducks to race in competitions! First, you will choose an egg. Each duck begins with unique running, swimming, climbing, and flying skills. Compete in amateur, advanced, and professional leagues. Train before each race to ensure a swift victory!

name: Ducklings.io
author: Poki
description: Ducklings is a cute IO-game where you are a caring duck that picks up lost ducklings from the pond. You are swimming around to collect as many lost ducklings as you can find to bring them safely to your nest. There is a catch however, as you are not the only caring parent duck in the pond; other ducks will try to steal your ducklings away from you so they get the honor and upgrades to your nest for saving them. For each duckling that you save you progress to the next level. You have finished the game after level 400! Make sure to avoid these other ducks and to protect your ducklings as good as you can.... Oh and look out for motorboats in the pond, as they will run you over. Controls: Move your duck - cursor About the creator: Pelican Party is a collaboration of two Dutch guys based in Rotterdam, the Netherlands. They have also created .

name: Dungeon Dash
author: Poki
description: Dungeon Dash is an action shooting game in which you delve into the Dungeon; a place full of monsters and hidden dangers, but also full of treasure! You have two superpowers in this game. The first one is to slow time, which makes it a lot easier to deal with really quick enemies. The other superpower is to do a quick dash. With the dash, you can shoot from one end of the room to the other! Not only is this very handy for dodging bullets, but dashing into enemies also does a lot of damage. This makes it a very good weapon as well. Armed with your powers and your favourite gun, you'll have to take on room after room of enemies. You'll have to defeat them all before you can continue. Be quick, however! If you don't shoot the enemies in the room fast enough, the roof collapses and it's game over. Can you defeat the bosses of the Dash Dungeon and find the treasure? How to play Dungeon Dash? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Use Shift to slow down time! Use the right mouse button to dash! Who created Dungeon Dash? Dungeon Dash is created by Chinatsu. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Dungeon Dash for free? You can play Dungeon Dash for free on Poki. Can I play Dungeon Dash on mobile devices and desktop? Craft new weapons and tools, explore dungeons to find valuables and blueprints, fight creatures, upgrade your gear and embark on an exciting adventure. Dungeon Miner will never get boring as it's laden with rich content and many surprises for you to explore. author: Poki
description: Dungeons & Dress-Ups is a unique dress-up game that incorporates elements from fantasy role-playing games. This game will put you into a magical world full of wonder and beauty, and you can be whoever you want to be! Do you want to be a legendary warrior descending from an ancestral line of mercenaries? Do you want to be the mischievous spell-casting princess of a distant kingdom? Do you want to be a pink-haired orc who uses bows and arrows? Or do you just want to be a nameless elf hero with an interesting sense of style for the medieval times? You can be all of them in Dungeons & Dress-Ups! All you need to do is create your hero and use the in-game panel to customize all aspects of your character from skin, hair, facial features, clothes, weapons, and the backdrop! Once you're happy with your creation, tap the button on the left to save it to your device. Go ahead and show us how creative you are - are you ready to choose your own adventure and create the perfect ensemble of heroes for your exciting stories? How to play Dungeons & Dress-ups? name: Fixing Time
author: Poki
description: Fixing Time is a single or two-player platform game where you play as Professor Tim, a brilliant scientist. You accidentally disrupted time while using your homemade time machine powered by clocks. Now, the lab is filled with broken clocks, and it's up to you to gather them all and repair the timeline. As you collect each broken clock, a clone of yourself from the past few seconds appears, mimicking your previous movements. Be careful—running into these clones will cause a time paradox, and it's game over! Play solo or invite a friend to join in the fun and work together to collect all the clocks without crossing paths with your past selves. Can you avoid the paradox and fix the broken timeline? How to play Fixing Time? 1 Player: Left and Right arrow keys for move. Space bar for jump. 2 players: One player uses Up/Down/Left/Right arrow keys for move and jump. Another player uses WASD for move and jump. Who created Fixing Time? Fixing Time is created by Air Guslar. Play their other skill and arcade games on Poki: Shady Bears , Lords of Gomoku and Gem 11 ! How can I play Fixing Time for free? You can play Fixing Time for free on Poki. Can I play Fixing Time on mobile devices and desktop? Fixing Time can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Fixing Time with my friend? Yes! Fixing Time is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!

name: Flags
author: Poki
description: Flags is a thinking game where you are presented with a random flag, and you must guess which country it belongs to. There are six main game modes: 60 Seconds (get as many flags correct as possible in one minute), Streak (play as long as you can without making a mistake), and Learn (wrong answers will be repeated). In the default mode, the game will display a flag and you will choose one of the countries listed below as potential answers. The second game mode works similarly but in reverse: The game will show you a country name and present you with three flags to choose from. The quicker you answer, the more points you will earn. And the more questions you get right without failing, the higher your score can be. What's your streak in Flags? Share the game with your friends and have a fun competition! How to play Flags? Tap one of the three answers listed below the flag/country. Who created Flags? Flags was created by supernice.games. Play their other games on Poki : Breakoid How can I play Flags for free? You can play Flags for free on Poki . Can I play Flags on mobile devices and desktop? Flags can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.

Do you have what it takes to clear every level in Flightless? How to play Flightless? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Use spacebar to place a magic ladder! Who created Flightless? description: Flip Hero is a delightful bike racing IO game created by KasSanity. Compete against other players as you advance from level to level and see what sweet flips you can pull! name: Flip Runner
author: Poki
description: Flip Runner is a parkour game where you can make parkour runs over the tops of buildings. Flip your way from top to top by doing front flips or backflips and complete all 39 levels to be the ultimate boss parkour runner. Earn some cash to unlock new characters, or train your current character to become the best Flip Runner! How to play: In Flip Runner you are a parkour runner. You are standing on the edge of buildings. First you'll have to aim where you want to jump. When the arrow is in the desired position, click. Whilst in mid-air, press and hold your left mouse-button to spin until your feet are pointing towards the floor and then release the mouse-button again. About the creator: Flip Runner was created by Motionvolt Games. They have also created the immensely popular Flip Master and Flip Diver back in the days. Lately they have also released Backflipper .

name: Flip the Bottle
author: Poki
description: Flip the Bottle is the digital version of the real-life classic game of "stick the landing". The premise is very simple: Swipe up to throw the bottle up in the air and watch it land properly --or not, depending on the quality of your aim. How much do you trust your bottle-landing skills? Can you beat the highest streak? Go ahead and try! How to play: Throw bottle - Swipe up & release About the creator: Flip the Bottle is created by CodeThisLab.

Losers will get their planets destroyed, so you need to be very quick on your feet. Jump between the platforms on the four corners of the screen to pick up energy. Once your power is loaded, you can unleash your special attack on your opponent. Do you have what it takes to win this competition? How to play: Player 1 Move - WASD Attack - C & V Player 2 Move - Arrow keys Attack - K & L About the creator: Flipchamps Dual Strike is created by Brad Erkkila. author: Poki
description: Floppy Tower is a skill game where you have to shoot your characters at the tower to destroy it! Make sure that the color of your character matches the color of the characters in the tower that you're trying to shoot. This will remove those characters, making the tower more unstable. Rotate the tower to find the best weak spots that match your color. Some characters hold bombs that you can use for a bigger explosion! Can you destroy the whole tower?  About the creator: Floppy Tower was created by Working Title Studios. This is their second game on Poki after Super Planet Fun Time !

name: FlowZ
author: Poki
description: FlowZ is a 3D liquid simulation game where you manage the flow of colorful fluid substance by arranging the direction of pipes. Our characters Green and Blue are thirsty, and you can only help them by giving them access to nutritious juice they crave. Simply tap or click on a pipe to rotate it. Then rotate all the following pieces so that the flow reaches the appropriate character. Blue only wants the blue water while green only accepts the green. The puzzles and contraptions will get more difficult as you progress in the game, so make sure each character gets the right color. If you're stuck, you can use a hint to show you the solution! If you don't want to go with the flow, you can control it in FlowZ! How to play FlowZ? Tap or click on a pipe to rotate it. Then rotate all the following pieces so that the flow reaches the appropriate character. Blue only wants the blue water while green only accepts the green. Who created FlowZ? FlowZ is created by NoPowerup, a game development company based in Vietnam. Play their other fun idle management and clicker games on Poki: Idle Gang , Survival Builder , Idle Tree City , Idle Digging Tycoon , Idle Lumber Inc , Idle Light City , Idle Success , Horse Shoeing , Merge Battle , ShootZ and Traffic Rush! name: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe
author: Poki
description: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe is a scary point-and-click game developed by FM Studio. name: Hill Climb Racing Lite
author: Poki
description: Hill Climb Racing Lite, is based on the wildly popular 2D physics-based mobile racing game Hill Climb Racing, that turned driving uphill into a full-blown obsession for millions worldwide. Think non-realistic physics meets coin-collecting chaos on impossible terrain featuring steep hills, deadly valleys, and treacherous jumps. Only funnier, more unpredictable, and way harder to put down. Hill Climb Racing Lite is a fast, lightweight HTML5 version of the classic game, available for free here on Poki. Developed by Fingersoft, it brings the iconic mobile experience to desktop browsers for the first time. The Lite version offers fewer lags, faster loading, and cross-device support, making hill climbing smoother than ever. With portrait mode and quick startup on mobile, it’s perfect for short play sessions on any device. New Update: World Tour levels Introducing World Tour, a brand-new mode that lets you race through a series of fun, hand-crafted levels. Each with its own finish line and its own challenges. Pick from hand-selected vehicles, climb your way through each stage, and enjoy your progress as you unlock new worlds. It’s the Hill Climb Racing you know and love, now with an easy-to-follow adventure built in. Cartapult has been added, a playful new feature that lets you launch back into the run from where you crashed. No need to start over, just fly back in and keep the momentum going! Explore the worlds of World Tour: Countryside Seasons Moon Super Countryside Neon Check out the gameplay video at the bottom of this page to see all the new worlds and vehicles in action. Here is what says Daniel Rantala, Chief Growth Officer at Fingersoft , says about the update: "We wanted to bring the Hill Climb Racing experience to Poki.com, where generations of players from longtime fans to newcomers, can enjoy timeless games in their browser. It’s like enjoying your childhood escape as your adult coffee break". Gameplay & Features Controls The beauty of Hill Climb Racing lies i

name: Level Devil
author: Poki
description: Level Devil is a pixel platform game where your goal is to reach the door at the end of each stage. Sounds simple, but this game trolls you any chance it gets. The longer you play, the more you start second-guessing everything. Platforms collapse the moment your foot touches them. Spikes slide into place mid-jump. Controls flip mid-run. The game changes right after you think you understand it. Play Level Devil for free and see why over 3 million Poki players have upvoted it! How Level Devil works In Level Devil, you will die. A lot. That's the design. Early stages introduce basic traps like pits and spikes. Moving too quickly or assuming the ground will stay where it is will result in instant failure. After a few attempts, you will start to understand the game's sense of humour and try to predict what will move next. Only to be trolled again because Level Devil wants to lure you into thinking you're safe. Later levels add new tricks that are harder to guess . Controls suddenly flip left and right and your jump sends you flying higher than you planned. Platforms move after you land on them. If you rush, you die. If you test the ground first, you might survive a bit longer than last time. Controls Movement is simple: You run left or right and jump. Desktop: Move : A / D or Left / Right arrow keys Jump: W, Up arrow, or Space bar Mobile: Use the on-screen arrow buttons to move Tap the jump button to jump Types of traps in Level Devil Every trap is designed to punish something you just did. Disappearing platforms: Some platforms vanish only after you step on them. Rushing forward leads to instant falls. Always prepare to jump again the moment you land. Control reversals: Left becomes right and can sometimes switch back during the level. Panicking here is certain death. Tap the directional buttons before committing to any movement. Moving hazards: Spikes, saws and walls often activate after you move near them. Standing still for a split second can reveal the pattern. Fake

name: Little Alchemy 2
author: Poki
description: Little Alchemy 2 is an online crafting game made by Recloak. The goal is to combine the starting elements to discover new items. You start the game with the four classical elements: earth, water, air and fire. With only these four elements you can discover countless new items. You encounter four different types of items in the game: Basic items: these are the items you get from the start or unlock by meeting certain conditions. Unlockable items: some items can exclusively be unlocked by reaching progress milestones or finding related items. Final items: items that can not be crafted into something new are final items. The final items will not show in the inventory and can be found in the encyclopedia. Depleted items: these are regular items at first, but will dissapear from your workspace once you have found all possible combinations of the item. Use your knowledge of science and common sense to find out the right combinations. Keep in mind, some of the combinations will be less obvious than others. You can play Little Alchemy 2 on Poki via your browser or mobile device. How to play Little Alchemy 2? Use your mouse to click, drag and drop items on top of each other to create new objects. When two items can be combined, your newly discovered item will pop up into your screen. Your progress can be found in the encyclopedia, where you will see all the items you have crafted and the combinations to get there. Once the board gets cluttered with items, you can click the clean up button in the top corner to remove the elements from the board. Little Alchemy 2 hints Click the dedicated hints button to receive help. The hint reveals an item you can discover by combining items in your inventory. About the creator Little Alchemy 2 is created by Recloak, a game development studio based in Warsaw, Poland. They are also the creators of the original little-alchemy.

The game will also evaluate how quickly and efficiently you answer these questions so you can determine how the game rates your attention score. description: Mahjoctopus is a puzzle game that combines the fun parts of mahjong and classic card games like solitaire. In this underwater-themed gorgeous puzzle experience, you will sort the tiles in an ascending or descending order. Check the number on the tile that's at the bottom of your screen, and pick a new card from the pile until you've come across a number that goes before or after it. Tapping on a correct tile will move it to the bottom of the game panel. Get more cards from the deck if you don't have a number that can be paired. If you're stuck, feel free to use the undo power-up or get a tile. Don't forget to tap on the mysterious sea creatures that pop up occasionally to get their surprises! How to play Mahjoctopus? Check the number on the tile that's at the bottom of your screen, and pick a new card from the pile until you've come across a number that goes before or after it. You can tap on a tile to move it to its appropriate place. Who created Mahjoctopus? Mahjoctopus is created by Adgard. Play their other addictive games on Poki: Pop It vs Spinner , Find The Candy , MadZOOng , and Merge to Million How can I play Mahjoctopus for free? You can play Mahjoctopus for free on Poki. Can I play Mahjoctopus on mobile devices and desktop? Mahjoctopus can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.

name: Mahjong
author: Poki
description: Mahjohng is a tile-based game commonly played by four players with a set of 144 tiles based on Chinese characters and symbols. Match tiles to solve classic Mahjong puzzles. You can only remove uncovered tiles which are free on at least one side. Scour each board layout for matching letters, numbers, and shapes. Since there is no time limit, you can play at your own pace. On Poki we have a whole selection of Mahjong Games .

name: Mahjong Cards
author: Poki
description: Mahjong Cards is a board game created by Indiesoft. Mahjong Card offers a unique mahjong experience by featuring a deck of cards instead of the traditional mahjong tiles. Your objective is to combine two of the same playing cards and try to remove the complete deck of cards. Pay attention to the fact that you can only remove free tiles that are not covered by other tiles, or that have at least one side free. If you get stuck, you can use the shuffle option at the bottom of the game page. Go ahead and check Mahjong Cards out: Deck card tiles are now in style! How to play: Match two identical mahjong cards by clicking or tapping on them consecutively. About the creator: Mahjong Cards is created by Indiesoft. They created the amazing Puffy Cat . You can play it for free on Poki .

Controls: Match and remove tiles - Left mouse button About the creator: Mahjong Firefly was created by TapLab Games. name: PolyTrack
author: Poki
description: PolyTrack PolyTrack is a time-trial car racing game where every run is about fixing the mistake you just made. At first you're trying to finish. After a few runs, you're chasing tenths of a second . Then you start noticing every small mistake that costs time. You take the first corner too fast. Restart. Brake earlier next time. Gain half a second. Instead of racing other cars, you chase your own best time to get better and better with each run. Play PolyTrack for free at Poki and jump straight into mastering each track! How PolyTrack works Every track is about replaying the same section and doing it better each time. You drive a section, spot where you lost speed and restart instantly. Now you try again with one change to see if it improves your time. Braking slightly earlier, turning tighter or landing straighter can cut 0.20 seconds from your time. Runs are short , so most of your time is spent retrying and fixing mistakes rather than racing . Leaderboards and ghost runs show where faster players gained time, giving you a target to beat. Progress comes from repeating sections until it starts to feel easier and more consistent. This turns messy runs into faster times Controls Simple controls keep your attention on steering accuracy and timing. Desktop: Drive: WASD or arrow keys Restart run: T Restart from checkpoint: R First-person view : C Pause game: Space bar Mobile: Use on-screen pedals to steer and perform all controls. Challenging other players You compete by comparing runs rather than racing side by side. Ghost replays and leaderboard times show how faster players take corners, which helps you understand where they gain speed and where you are losing it. Watching another run often reveals faster routes or places where you can improve your controls to shave some time off your score. PolyTrack maps PolyTrack includes 13 official tracks and 30+ community creations across Summer, Winter and Desert themes. Each map needs you to drive a little differently: Some de

author: Poki
description: QWOP is a skill game where you must control the movement of the athlete's legs to make the character move forward while trying to avoid falling over. You must do all of this only using the Q, W, O and P keys! The Q and W keys each drive one of the runner's thighs, while the O and P keys work the runner's calves. The Q key drives the runner's right thigh forward and left thigh backward, and the W key also affects the thighs and does the opposite. The O and P keys work in the same way as the Q and W keys, but with the runner's calves. The actual amount of movement of a joint is affected by the resistance due to forces from gravity and inertia placed upon it. The only person you need to compete with is yourself in QWOP. Do you have the perseverance to feel like a winner? Go ahead and play it, and share your score with your friends while you're at it. Make sure to check QWOP's sequel GIRP on Poki! How to play QWOP? Control the movement of the athlete's legs to make the character move forward while trying to avoid falling over only using the Q, W, O and P keys. Who created QWOP? QWOP was created by Bennett Foddy. Play their other legendary games on Poki: Get On Top , Too Many Ninjas , GIRP , Little Master Cricket , and Pole Riders

name: Run 3
author: Poki
description: Run 3 Run 3 is a space running game where you guide a small alien through floating tunnels filled with gaps and collapsing tiles while gravity flips as you run. Miss a jump and you drift into space. Run onto a wall and gravity rotates, turning that wall into your new floor so you keep running on a different side of the tunnel. In Run 3, some tiles crumble, while ice tiles force earlier jumps. If you jump the same way every time, you will fall. Play Run 3 for free at Poki and see how far you can go before the tunnels make you miss a jump. How Run 3 works You run automatically. Because you cannot stop moving, every landing must prepare the next jump. Line yourself up and time your jumps so that every landing gets you ready for the next platform. Run 3 is about looking ahead before you land. Move left or right to prepare your next landing, not just to avoid falling. Jump to clear gaps, but focus on where you will land next. Run onto walls to rotate gravity and continue along a new surface. Collapsing tiles remove safe ground quickly, so waiting too long usually causes you to fall. Ice requires earlier jumps because of increased speed, while conveyors demand delayed timing based on which way they move. Controls Desktop: Move sideways: Left / Right arrows Jump: Up arrow / Space Mobile: Use the on-screen controls to move and jump. Holding jump increases distance . Short taps help control smaller adjustments when precision matters more than speed. Run 3 game modes Run 3 includes 2 game modes that change how you play. Explore Mode: Move through hundreds of connected levels and revisit paths to practise difficult sections. This mode lets you see how surfaces change your jumps on each level. Infinite Mode: Endless runs focused on survival and collecting Power Cells. Playing repeatedly lets you react faster to new tunnel layouts, making this the best mode for improving consistency. Optional challenges reward Power Cells for completing levels in unusual ways, letting you replay

author: Poki
description: SlashZ is a cutting simulation game where you cut various household objects from different angles. Make the surface area as small as possible without slashing the innocent beetles. Pay attention to bonus objectives like flying beetles, slash combos and perfect slashes as they will help you score better points. Share SlashZ with your friends and see who has the steadiest hand! name: Slice Master
author: Poki
description: Slice Master is a one-button skill game where you flip a spinning knife through levels packed with objects to slice and obstacles to avoid. Every click sends you spinning through the air to slice fruits, foods and other objects . But one bad spin into spikes ends the run instantly. Play Slice Master for free at Poki and see if your skills are as sharp as the knife! How Slice Master works As the knife spins through the air, land on objects to cut through them and click to launch yourself toward the next target. Each slice adds to your score , but hazards like the pink spikes or gaps can instantly end the run if you click too early or too late. Most runs fail by a fraction of a second. If you hesitate slightly on when to click, you hit the pink spikes or fly past the objects. Adjust your timing by clicking slightly earlier , and suddenly you're slicing most objects and avoiding spikes at the same time. Controls Every move in Slice Master is controlled by a single action: Desktop: Click the left mouse button Mobile: Tap on the game screen Unlock new knives Earn cash during strong runs to unlock all 9 knives , each one showing how far you've made it since the start of the game. You start with the standard kitchen knife. The first unlock will cost you $5k, and they become more expensive over time . New knives don't make the game easier, as they are just for show. Only better timing lets you go farther and get higher scores. Getting higher scores in Slice Master Your final landing determines how much your score is multiplied. Landing on the right spot can massively boost your score. You can increase your score by landing one of the following multipliers: x2 x3 x5 x10 x25 x50 This works by taking the amount of cash you earned in the round and multiplying it by this number. The higher the multiplier, the more precise your final landing needs to be. Going for x50 means aiming for a tiny target instead of the easy landing. At first, you are just trying to finish levels. Later

name: Spades
author: Poki
description: Spades is a card game created by MarketJS. In this game, your objective is to take the number of tricks (also known as "books") that were bid before play of the hand began. Spades is traditionally a game for four players, played in partnership (with the partners sitting opposite each other). The players take turns playing out one card from their hands clockwise around the table. The objective of Spades is for your partnership to accurately estimate the strength of your hands in the bidding, and then in the play to take as close to your estimate of tricks as you can. name: Sprunki
author: Poki
description: Play Sprunki online In Sprunki you build music by placing characters into empty slots and listening to how their sounds fit together. The more you experiment , the easier it becomes to hearl when a mix sounds right . While it's a playful music game that's easy to experiment with, Sprunki has a secret that changes the tone of every track. Find out what it is at Poki! Build and change music in Sprunki When you play Sprunki, you build a looping track by placing characters into empty slots. You begin by dragging characters into place and listening as the sounds start to match or clash. Most players start with 2-3 characters . As you add more, mixes usually feel crowded at around 4-5. Each character immediately adds one sound to the mix. You can remove or replace any character at any time, and the music updates instantly. Sprunki gives you 20 characters across 4 sound types . Here are the different types of sounds in Sprunki and the characters that make them. Sound type Characters What you hear Beats Orange (Oren), Red (Raddy), Silver (Clukr), Fun Bot, Green (Vineria) Drum hits, repeating percussive patterns Effects Gray, brud (Brown), Garnold (Gold), OWAKCX (Lime), Sky (Blue) High sounds that sit in the background and fill empty space Melodies Mr. Sun, Durple (Purple), Mr. Tree, Simon (Yellow), Tunner (Tan) Tunes, motifs layered over beats Vocals Mr. Fun Computer, Wenda (White), Pinki (Pink), Jevin (Blue) Synthesized vocals and choir-like tones Swapping just 1 character out of a 4-character mix is often enough to change the entire mood of the track. Sometimes a mix suddenly clicks, and you stop changing things just to let it play . Tools to help you experiment Sprunki has 2 basic features : Restart button: You can remove all Sprunkis that you placed by pressing the restart button in the top right of the game Gallery: Here, you can view some art from the creator of the game showing how they created some of the characters There are also 3 character-specific features as we

Escape from deadly sharks, win a boxing match or slay a dragon - Stupidella can do it all! All she needs is your help to find the right solution, which might not always be easy to find. name: Sudoblocks
author: Poki
description: Sudoblocks is a tile-matching puzzle game that combines the sudoku experience with the block genre. Although a block game in its soul, it adopts the input of the Sudoku mechanics by introducing a new mechanic: Your job is to clean the board by using the pieces on the right to fill the 3x3 squares or complete straight lines. The left side holds your power-ups that will help you beat the game such as undo, destroy, rotate, swap. There are three game modes for your every mood: Standard, timed, or relaxed. It even has a night mode! Sudoblocks offers a puzzle experience like you've never seen before! How to play: Pick up a piece from the right container by holding down your left mouse button, and drop it on an empty block by releasing it. About the creator: Sudoblocks is created by Infinity Games, a game development studio based in Portugal. They are specialized in relaxing games such as Energy , Infinity Loop and Shapes . You can play them all for free on Poki !

You can also make merge-combos to increase your score. Keep your several eyes on the ball and beat your friends' high scores! How to play: Rotate pieces - Click or tap Place pieces - Drag and drop About the creator: Sugar Eyes was created by WeDoYouPlay. Play their other puzzle game on Poki: Words Emoji

name: Sugar, Sugar 2
author: Poki
description: Sugar, Sugar 2 is a simulation game created by Bart Bonte. In the sequel to the popular Sugar, Sugar game, you'll try to solve carefully crafted puzzles by sifting sugar into coffee cups. Your job is to draw bridges and well-placed lines to capture each grain. Every level will have a new, sweet challenge, and the obstacles get harder as the game progresses. Concentrate to reach every granular objective and finish every level without making a mess of the floor. How to play: Use your left mouse button or finger to draw a line, and fill up the cups. This line will act as a wall or barrier to keep the sugar from falling outside the desired area. About the creator: Sugar, Sugar 2 was created by Bart Bonte. Play their other games on Poki : sugar-sugar-html5, Blue , Green and Factory Balls Forever

name: Super Falling Fred
author: Poki
description: Super Falling Fred is a free online web game and the latest release in the "Fred Series" created by Dedalord. You play this game by trying to fall down as long as you can trying to avoid hitting any objects that come your way. By dodging obstacles using your keyboard you gain points over time. Just as in Running Fred, there are endless amounts of rewards to be earned, the further you fall down. How to play? You can move your character by using the arrow keys on your keyboard to avoid obstacles. Especially avoid hitting the skull of your character. By collecting coins during your fall you can buy special power-ups or enable new characters. What characters are available? - Fred - Ogama B. Ladder - Haward Sparks - Zombie Fred - Jamie Prince - Martin Castor - Outragious B. - Crash T. Dummy - M. Gandalfi - Mental Dude - Emotika Diva Are there any cheat codes? We are not aware of any cheat codes. If you do know a cheat code, sent us a message for us to share here. Who created Super Falling Fred? Dedalord is the creator of Super Falling Fred, which is part of the larger Fred series. They have also created Running Fred and Skiing Fred! The creators are based in Argentina, South America.

description: Super Fowlst is an action game created by Thomas K. Young. The world is overrun by demons, and you're the only chicken who can stop them... How, you ask? There’s sprawling procedurally generated stages to conquer, huge bosses to defeat, and all manner of gadgets and gizmos to interact with. Did we mention 30 unlockable characters?! Don't forget to trade your treasure for cool powers like egg bombs and rockets so you can really show those demons who’s boss! How to play: Tap to jump mid-air and attack foes. About the creator: Super Fowlst is created by Thomas K. Young. This is their first game on Poki!

There are sprawling, procedurally-generated stages to conquer, huge bosses to defeat, and all manner of gadgets and gizmos to interact with. Build your tower with up to six floors, load them with weapons, upgrade, evolve and defeat your opponents in fantastic battles! Come up with your own battle strategy with eight unique classes (Warrior, Paladin, Undead, Orc, Viking, Wizard, Fire Elemental, Stone Golem) and ten insanely powerful weapon types (Machine Guns, Cannons, Flame Guns, Bomb Launchers, Shockwaves, Rocket Launchers, Lasers, Teslas, Ice Cannons, Mighty Plasma Cannons). With over 280 levels in the campaign mode and endless fun in the multiplayer mode, every match will feel like a different experience. Are you ready to crush your opponent's tower? For honor and glory! How to play: Click or tap on one of your tower floors to select it, and click or tap one of the enemy floors to attack. Pay attention to the power-up icons when they appear near your tower to use power-ups like Shield, Healing, Thunderstorm, Ice, and more. About the creator: Tower Crush was created by Impossible Apps. This is their first game on Poki!

But as the game goes on, you will need to think strategically and be resourceful to survive. Go ahead and merge away! Controls: Click or tap on a turret below to select it. Click again on an empty tile to place the turret. Drag a unit and drop it on an identical one to merge them. About the creator: Tower Defense Mingling was created by Zonda Creative Studio. author: Poki

The uncovered cards will become playable, and your objective is to destroy the three peaks. Don't forget to spend your coins on gorgeous table backgrounds. Go ahead and give Tri Peaks a try, or a peek! How to play: Use your cursor to choose a card and use the left mouse button to play it. About the creator: Tri Peaks is created by DrMop, a game developer based in the United Kingdom who has many entertaining and thought-provoking games on Poki such as monster-mash, wordsmith, wordy-pop, Australian Patience and Solitaire Golf !

name: Tribals.io
author: Poki
description: Tribals.io is a multiplayer survival game where you craft, mine, build and explore an island trying to survive. Tribals combines familiar mechanics from games like Minecraft, Rust and ARK Survival into this free and easy to play survival game! Choose to build your own base and go at the island either alone or with your friends! There is so much to do, from chasing chickens and being chased by bears, to building huge bases and crafting all sorts of tools and weapons. Create your own character and jump into the wild to see how long you can survive. Explore the island but be careful of your hunger and thirst levels, get too low and.. well you don’t want to find out! With loads of different items to gather and even more to craft, you will never run out of things to do! See how long you and your friends can survive together or against each other. Tribals can be played both solo and with others so jump in and figure out how you want to play! Can you conquer the island and become the best tribe? How to play Tribals.io Movement: WASD Jump: Space Bar Main action: Left Mouse Button Use microphone: Press T Open inventory: Tab Use text chat: Enter Build menu: Right click Who created Tribals.io? Tribals.io is created by ONRUSH Studio. Check out their other game on Poki: Venge.io ! How can I play Tribals.io for free? You can play Tribals.io for free on Poki How can I level up in Tribals.io? You can choose between lots of hair and beard styles. You can also change the size of each body part, change the hair, beard and skin color, as well as adding some tattoos! What kind of items can you find? There are two kinds of items scattered around the island that you can pick up. There are four standard game modes and maps and countless custom maps/game modes. Play with 7 different weapons and 4 different heroes. In the shop you can buy skins for your heroes and camos for your guns. Invite your friends by sharing the link in the lobby screen and enjoy this amazing game together! You can play Venge.io completely for free on your PC, mobile phone, or tablet. There is no download needed, just access the game directly in your browser. For the PC we also have full-screen mode available. Enjoy playing Venge.io on Poki and maybe we will see you on top of the leaderboards! Maps & Game Modes Sierra - POINT You play a game mode similar to capture-the-flag/domination in a desert-like map. The goal is staying in the green area (Flag Point) and unlock tier abilities. The capture time varies around 1 minute. Xibalba - BLACKCOIN You play a game mode where you have to collect 'Black Coins' after killing someone in a dark mysterious map. The goal is to collect these coins after killing someone, and thereafter 'deliver' them to the green area in the temple. Tundra - GUNGAME You play the classic game mode gun-game in a winter-like map. The goal is to play through all different weapons. After every kill your rank up and get to play a different weapon. Mistle - PAYLOAD You play a refreshing new game mode in a small town-like map. The goal of this game mode is to push a minecart to the opponent's side. You do this by standing in the green area around the cart. Within this green area, you can unlock your abilities. Scraper - POINT A Strategic map inspired by Asian culture for close or medium range battles. Stay in the green area and protect it from other players to get score. Upgrade character abilities and use your tactical skills to win! Loadout Heroes You can play as 4 different heroes; Lilium, Shin, Echo, and Kulu. All the characte

name: Viking Village
author: Poki
description: Viking Village is a strategy game where you're in charge of building and defending your villages against nightly invasions. Collect resources, build armies, archer towers at strategic positions, and control melee Viking warriors directly to survive. You need to have your units attack enemy villages and destroy their village fire to win. You can capture powerful barbarians and dragons to add to your defense. There are many heroes and pets with unique abilities to choose from. You can even control deer directly if you need some extra attack power! How many days can you survive in Viking Village? How to play Viking Village? Tap on wooden stumps to create farms, trees or stone mines. Tap on 'Create Unit' button, then tap on 'Villager' button to spawn a villager. Villagers will automatically start gathering resources from a free farm, tree or stone mine. Only 1 villager can work on a resource site. Hero is selected by default - tap anywhere on the ground to move the hero. Hero's pet will follow automatically. Create warriors and archers by tapping on 'Create Unit' button. Villagers, warriors and archers need houses - make more houses by tapping on 'Build' button Defend the village fire at all costs - enemies will come every night to destroy it. Amass an army and destroy the enemy village fire to win. Who created Viking Village? Viking Village is created by Limitless, a game development studio based in the United States. They have another game on Poki: Apple Knight ! You can find both games on the App Store and Play Store!

description: Vortelli's Pizza is a multiplayer restaurant game where you own a cozy pizza joint and serve your customers delicious food. This game puts importance on team work, but you can also play it alone! Switch on the "Open Restaurant" flip so customers start walking in. Go to the cash register to get their order, then go to the kitchen to prepare the dough. You'll need to combine water and flour in the mixer, then take it to the rolling station where you shape the pizza and add all the ingredients the customer asked. You could choose from cheese, pepperoni, pineapple, ham, sauce, sausage, etc. Then pop it in the oven and wait for it to bake until the timer rings. Don't stall too much, because your customers can run out of patience and storm off! If you're struggling, check the tip jar to find some money to afford better appliances and tools to make your job easier. Don't forget to unlock new stations, too, as you will run out of counter space as the restaurant gets busier. Feed your monster enough times and eventually it will evolve into a new type of monster. Keep feeding your monsters information and explore the limits of the evolution of intelligent life! name: Word Slide
author: Poki
description: Word Slide is a puzzle game where you rearrange columns of letters to form meaningful words. Your job is to come up with words until each individual letter tile has been used. Every time you form a correct word, the letters you've used will change in color. Pay attention to this rule and finish a level when all of the letter tiles turn brown. There are six languages that have 50 challenges each. If you're stuck, make sure to unlock a hint that shows you which words you're looking for. You can also skip a level if it's too difficult for you. Don't forget to share Word Slide with your friends and improve your vocabulary skills together! How to play Word Slide? Swipe a word column up or down to rearrange the letters. The row with the arrow indicators should always form a meaningful word. When you've formed a correct word, the tiles should change in color. Who created Word Slide? Word Slide is created by Unico Studio. name: World Conquest
author: Poki
description: Take on the role of commander in World Conquest! In this Risk-like strategy war game, it's up to you to defeat your enemies, conquer all the territories and win! Each turn, you decide where you want to place your troops and which areas you want to attack. The more areas you control, the more troops you will receive to fight with. At the end of your turn, you can get a card. If you get the right combination, you can use these cards to summon a lot of extra troops! If you capture all of your enemies territories, they will lose the game. But beware! If you lose all your territories its game over for you. There are three difficulty levels to choose from and three different maps to play. Real strategic masterminds can try their hand at Risiko mode. Your opponent can do the same and escape the attack, so you'll have to be fast. In Championship mode you can pick a wrestler from your favourite country and set out for the World Champion Title. In a 4 match bracket you will have to win every match to become number one! Finally, there's Versus mode in which you and a friend can see who the best wrestler is in a one on one match. You both have 30 seconds to score as many points as possible. The wrestler with the most points wins! Can you become the next wrestling champion? How to play World Wrestling 23? name: Yacht
author: Poki
description: Yacht is a classic dice game, dating back from 1938. The game is the predecessor of Yahtzee and has a lot of similarities to the Latin-American Generala, the Scandinavian Yatzy and the English game of Poker Dice. In this game, you have got 6 dice and the goal is to throw as much special combinations as possible. A turn starts with the first throw. After this throw you can choose which dice you want to lock for your combination, and you can throw the other dice for a second time. From this throw you can again lock some dice and then you can make a final throw. After this throw you can choose which combination you get in the scorecard. Pro tip: Try to go for the higher combinations first. If you don't have a good combination at the end of your turn, make sure to put it on the lower combinations as they are worth less points. How to play: Use you mouse/finger and follow the instructions on the screen. About the creator: Yacht was created by Codethislab. They are well known for all their classic games on Poki, like Uno Online, Foosball and Master Checkers.

There is an endless mode and also over a hundred meticulously designed puzzles for you to solve, so the game will keep feeling fresh even after playing it for hours! Make sure to get a hint if you're stuck and not sure how to pass a level. Can you finish every level in Yarn Untangle? How to play Yarn Untangle? Hold down your cursor or finger to select a ball of yarn and untangle it by moving it. Who created Yarn Untangle? Yarn Untangle was created by Salt Pastel Studio. This is their first game on Poki! Use the rules of physics to your advantage and don't let any of the pieces fall into the water, as it will cost you a life. But don't worry, you can always replay it and try different techniques! Like its name, Zen Blocks offers a relaxing, stress-free gaming experience. How to play Zen Blocks? Hold down your mouse cursor (tap and hold on touch devices) to grab a block and release to drop the block. Who created Zen Blocks? Zen Blocks is created by Madbox, a game development studio based in France. name: Zomball
author: Poki
description: Zomball is an arcade game created by Totebo. You are a zombie basketball player whose dream is to become the next Lebron James, but you need to throw your own body parts instead of a basketball! Each time you shoot successfully, your body part will reattach to you to use it again. If you miss, you will lose that limb and move on to the next one until you run out of limbs altogether. The further you get in the game, the harder the shot will be. So control your power and angle, swipe carefully, and try to break your own record in one piece. Achieving your dream can cost you an arm and a leg, literally! How to play: Swipe with your finger or the left mouse button to throw a limb.
